ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the performance metric */,
  "away_team_stat" REAL /* Stat value for the away team */,
  "away_team_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the away team based on the stat */,
  "home_team_stat" REAL /* Stat value for the home team */,
  "home_team_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the home team based on the stat */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., scoring, passing, rushing) */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season for the metric */,
  "game_week" INTEGER /* Week of the season for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric used */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the match event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the match event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match event associated with the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., passing yards, rushing yards) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES match_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric influencing the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coaching strategy */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who defined the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_strategies_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_strategies_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "total_scoring" REAL /* Total scoring made by the team */,
  "total_rushing" REAL /* Total rushing yards made by the team */,
  "total_passing" REAL /* Total passing yards made by the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season for the aggregated statistics */,
  "total_defense" REAL /* Total defensive yards allowed by the team */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the performance */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season for the recorded performance */,
  "performance_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric associated with the historical record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the historical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
